page_settings.seo_title: Drain Cleaning Services — Regal Plumbing & Rooter | Ontario, CA
page_settings.seo_description: Professional drain cleaning for kitchen, bathroom, and main sewer line blockages. Serving the Inland Empire. Call (909) 600-4561.

settings.editor: 24/7 Emergency Service Available — Call (909) 600-4561
Professional drain clearing for kitchen, bathroom, and main sewer line blockages throughout Southern California

Slow or blocked drains are more than an inconvenience — they can signal deeper plumbing issues and lead to pipe damage or backups if left untreated. Regal Plumbing & Rooter uses professional-grade equipment to clear everything from minor bathroom clogs to severe main line blockages, restoring full flow and preventing future buildup.

• Kitchen drain and grease trap clearing
  • Bathroom sink, tub, and shower drain cleaning
  • Main sewer line snaking and clearing
  • Floor drain and utility sink service
  • Camera inspection to diagnose root causes
  • Preventative maintenance plans available
Clear grease, food buildup, and soap scum that accumulates in kitchen sink drains. We also service garbage disposals and grease traps.
Remove hair, soap residue, and debris from tub, shower, and sink drains. Fast clearing with minimal disruption.
Professional snaking and clearing of main line blockages before they cause sewage backup. Camera inspection available to find root causes.

settings.description_text: Upfront, transparent quotes before any work begins. No hidden fees, no surprises — even in emergencies.
24/7 availability for emergencies. We arrive quickly and work efficiently to minimize damage.
Every job backed by our commitment to premium craftsmanship and lasting results.

settings.editor: Call for a free quote — same-day service often available
